title: Cognizant (CTSH) Expands Partner Base With a Global Law Firm
text: Law firm Freshfields Bruckhaus Deringer selects Cognizant (CTSH) to manage its IT infrastructure, applications and service desk.

title: Why Are So Many Gurus Buying Cognizant?
text: Cognizant Technology Solutions Corp. ( CTSH , Financial) is a large information technolgy services company based in New Jersey that has a large technical workforce in India. The company caught my attention due to the high level of guru buying in the second quarter.

title: Here's Why Cognizant (CTSH) is a Strong Value Stock
text: Whether you're a value, growth, or momentum investor, finding strong stocks becomes easier with the Zacks Style Scores, a top feature of the Zacks Premium research service.
